text.title: Product Analytics Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Versioned plan + metric tree + anomaly rules
example.note: Illustrates tracking-plan-versioned + event-naming-strict + primary-metric-trees + anomaly-rule-set + pii-redaction-pre-llm.

example.title: Mystery events + vanity dashboards + late PII
